name: goals-backend
description: Lambda backend for the goals tracker. Serves goals + completions through API Gateway, backed by DynamoDB.

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/handlers/index.js && node --check src/lib/router.js && node --check src/lib/dynamo.js && node --check src/lib/time.js

comment: No runtime dependencies — @aws-sdk/client-dynamodb and @aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb ship with the Lambda nodejs20.x runtime, so nothing needs to be bundled.
